title: [BSL] Better Server List
description: This mod Improves upon the existing Minecraft Multiplayer server list
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8b50c42285dd669b14300171f38c020d7aa4b7b.png)

This is a standalone (has no dependencies) 
```
1.15 - 26.1
```
 mod that adds quite alot of **QOL changes** to the **Minecraft Multiplayer Screen**. These changes Include:
- **Servers Finder**
- **Search function for servers**
- **Favorites & Tags**
- **Sorting by Tags**

# Showcase:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UpNb6y3GuBY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Note:

Buttons on versions prior to 1.20 look slightly different to ones on 1.20+ due to the logic used on 1.20+ being incompatible with older versions
